headline: Raymond James Maintains Strong Buy on Union Pacific, Raises Price Target to $363
summary: Raymond James  analyst Patrick Tyler Brown   maintains Union Pacific (NYSE:UNP) with a Strong Buy and raises the price target from $310 to $363.
